name: components/table
description: A semantic HTML table wrapper with styled rows, headers, and cells designed for data-dense layouts. Provides a complete composition system with Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, and TableCaption. Includes hover states on rows, selected-row highlighting, checkbox alignment helpers, and responsive overflow scrolling. Uses native table elements under the hood for maximum accessibility.
useCases: Data tables listing users, orders, or transactions with sortable column headers
Invoice line-item breakdowns using TableHeader, TableBody, and TableFooter for totals
Comparison matrices (pricing, features) with highlighted rows and caption descriptions
Admin audit logs with selectable rows for bulk export or deletion actions
usage: import { Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell, TableCaption } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/table"
